positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~winner(X0) | steinhauer = X0).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~in_six_way_tie(descampe)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    winner(steinhauer)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define on_leaderboard(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define participated(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define from_belgium(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
